pi_items.source: CSS font-family stack: 'NonExistentFont' (fallback) -> 'DejaVu Sans' (verified available on system via fc-list). Setup script line 58 defines font-family with DejaVu Sans as the second font, which will be used when the first non-existent font is not found.

CSS HSL variables resolved to RGB. Setup script defines --brand-hue: 210, --brand-sat: 100%, --brand-light: 50%, which produces --brand-primary: hsl(210, 100%, 50%). Mathematical conversion using HSL to RGB formula yields RGB(0, 127.5, 255), which rounds to RGB(0, 128, 255). The .btn-primary class uses background-color: var(--brand-primary) which resolves to this value.

CSS calc() formula resolved. Setup script defines --spacing-unit: 8px and --border-multiplier: 0.75. The .alert class uses border-left: calc(var(--spacing-unit) * var(--border-multiplier)) solid #ffc107; which computes to calc(8px * 0.75) = 6px (line 93).
CSS opacity property directly set. Setup script line 102 defines opacity: 0.75; for the footer element.

Tolerance parameter used in verifier.py for color distance calculations. This is a reasonable tolerance to account for potential rounding differences in color values across browsers. The verifier uses color_distance function to allow up to 5 units of Euclidean distance in RGB space (line 90 of verifier.py).

privileged_info_summary: All metadata claims have been verified as correct. The task uses a synthetic design system with computed CSS values: heading font resolves to DejaVu Sans through font-family fallback, button background color is HSL(210, 100%, 50%) which converts to RGB(0, 128, 255), alert border width is computed via CSS calc() as 6px from 8px * 0.75, and footer opacity is set to 0.75. All required HTML elements (h1, .btn-primary, .alert, footer) are present in the generated page.
